use_cases: Call-to-action button for landing pages and marketing sites requiring visual emphasis
Accent button for creative portfolios and media applications
Interactive button for user engagement features in SaaS dashboards
Hero section button with eye-catching animated border effect
Fun, playful action button for consumer-facing applications
ai_summary: A vibrant animated button component featuring continuously cycling rainbow gradient borders with a soft glow blur effect. The button uses a dark background with white text and includes hover transitions for polished interactivity. Built with styled-jsx for encapsulated CSS animations that create the rainbow effect using linear gradients and keyframe animations.
